_: Generation provenance for figure batches shown on the site, copied from the engine repo's data/simulated/<batch>.report.json sidecars.

steering._: Causal steering results copied from the engine repo's overnight run (trace_out/urgency_downgrades_20260707T1_steer, 2026-07-08); Neuronpedia /api/steer, strength +/-10, top-5 features, greedy 8-token continuations.

key_example.note: amplifying the clinical graph's top-5 clinical features while the model reads the patient wording restores the clinical continuation

translation_cases._: Top-token shifts through the translated third panel, copied from the engine's mitigation trace (trace_out/urgency_downgrades_20260707T1, gemma-2-2b, 2026-07-07). Each entry: [token, probability] for the clinical, patient, and translated prompts.

ladder_digestive._: Dose-response ladder, digestive condition (engine trace_out/dialects_20260708T011831Z, gemma-2-2b). Fixed clinical term held verbatim in every rung; entries are the top next-token [token, probability] per register rung.

rungs.rung: Rung 2 - mostly clinical, one everyday word
Rung 3 - even mix of clinical and everyday phrasing
Rung 5 - maximally casual spoken phrasing with slang
